source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Geist or Inter for calm product UI with Noto Sans JP guidance for Japanese headings, body, labels, and dashboard data.
layout: Precise shadcn/tweakcn grids, 8px radii, stacked cloud-layer panels, translucent dividers, mountain-wave contour cues, restrained vapor-grain texture, and airy operational dashboard surfaces.

prompts.label: Transparent Lenticular Cloud motif source
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create only a Lenticular Cloud motif for later background removal: an isolated smooth stacked lenticular cloud formation shaped by mountain-wave airflow, no landscape, no text.
Subject: a sculptural lens-shaped cloud stack with layered pancake-like bands, pearl-white illuminated rims, blue-shadow underside, faint sunset peach and apricot glow along the upper edges, soft vapor texture contained inside a crisp readable silhouette. The subject should read immediately as a lenticular cloud, not a generic cumulus cloud.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; horizontal aerodynamic saucer silhouette; do not crop the cloud; strong readable motif asset for a layered interface design system.
Lighting/mood: clean atmospheric studio light preserving pearl white, cool blue shadow, and warm sunset edge light; calm mountain-wave mood, layered interface-system feel.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00ff00 or green anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no mountain, no sky gradient, no horizon, no aircraft, no birds, no rain, no lightning, no props, no labels, no watermark, no decorative background, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Lenticular Cloud", derived from a lenticular cloud motif: smooth stacked lens-shaped cloud bands formed by mountain-wave airflow, pearl-white rims, cool blue-shadow underside, and sunset peach/apricot edge light.
Reference use: Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from layered lenticular cloud strata, pearl white vapor, blue shadow, dusk peach glow, high-altitude mist, and calm mountain-wave motion. Use only these motif-derived colors plus near-neutrals from the same source.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 board, 3840 x 2160 preferred, at least 2400px wide. Create a single polished source board, not separate pages.
Resolution and legibility: high-resolution 4K-class source board with large readable labels and clear UI examples; avoid dense tiny token tables.
Required visible sections: Morphous Lenticular Cloud title, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples; guidance for Geist or Inter paired with Noto Sans JP; calm layered interface-system tone, precise and airy without being decorative.
UI coverage: shadcn/tweakcn-compatible buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command palette search, sidebar navigation, top nav, dashboard metric cards, bar/line/donut charts, empty/loading/error/success/warning states, form validation, compact data table, texture swatches, radius 8px, spacing scale, border tokens, focus rings, shadow tokens.
Visual style: premium layered product UI system, precise grid, 8px card radius, crisp shadcn-style controls, translucent cloud-layer dividers, stacked panel elevations, calm airflow contour cues, fine vapor grain texture used sparingly, operational dashboard surfaces.
Palette labels to show: Pearl White, Blue Shadow, Sunset Peach, Apricot Rim, Wave Mist, Cloud Slate, Vapor Ink, Stratus Line, Alpine Glow, Dusk Signal.
Text: short readable UI labels only; use real section labels listed above; avoid long paragraphs.
Constraints: no colors outside the motif palette, no generic purple or blue gradients, no mountain photo background, no random brand names, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Lenticular Cloud".

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a dark-mode companion board for the same Morphous theme named "Morphous Lenticular Cloud". It must feel like the visible light board translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: Use a lenticular cloud motif and the completed light-mode design-system direction as references. Preserve smooth stacked lens-shaped cloud layers, pearl-white rims, cool blue-shadow undersides, sunset peach/apricot edge light, calm mountain-wave contour cues, translucent stacked panels, component coverage, spacing, and 8px radius.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 board, 3840 x 2160 preferred, at least 2400px wide. Create one polished dark-mode source board.
Resolution and legibility: high-resolution board with large readable labels and clear shadcn/tweakcn UI examples; avoid dense tiny text.
Required visible sections: Morphous Lenticular Cloud, Dark Mode, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows.
Typography: English and Japanese examples; Geist or Inter plus Noto Sans JP; compact product UI, calm layered interface-system tone.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command palette search, sidebar navigation, top nav, dashboard metric cards, charts, empty/loading/error/success/warning states, form validation, compact data table, texture swatches, radius 8px, spacing scale, border tokens, focus rings, shadow tokens.
Visual details: deep vapor-ink background, pearl-white foreground, blue-shadow elevated cards, sunset-peach primary actions, apricot-rim status chips, alpine-glow focus rings, stratus-line borders, subtle vapor grain and mountain-wave contour texture, crisp layered controls for operational dashboards.
Palette labels to show: Pearl White, Blue Shadow, Sunset Peach, Apricot Rim, Wave Mist, Cloud Slate, Vapor Ink, Stratus Line, Alpine Glow, Dusk Signal.
Text: short readable UI labels only; use real section labels listed above.
Constraints: no neon colors, no pure black flat background, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no mountain photo background, no random brand names, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Lenticular Cloud".
